positive: A whimsical, minimalist illustration featuring a group of diverse, anthropomorphic forest animals (fox, bear, owl, squirrel) engaged in a playful gathering around a glowing lantern. The style is sophisticated neo-traditional illustration mixed with clean vector art, characterized by crisp lines and bold color blocking. The composition must be central and symmetrical, ideal for a circular print emblem. Use a limited, complementary color palette of deep sapphire blue, forest emerald green, warm mustard yellow, and burnt sienna. The overall feeling should be cozy, adventurous, and magical. High contrast is key, emphasizing clean silhouettes against a lightly textured background, ensuring the design translates perfectly to screen printing on apparel. Perfect for merchandise.
negative: lowres, bad anatomy, mutated, extra limbs, poorly drawn, blur, grain, noise, signature, watermark, text, logo, border, copyright, distracting details, complex shading, grung, sketch, realistic photo, masterpiece, cinematic
